Instruction: Walk straight forward along the paved path with the yellow tactile line, keeping the modern glass building on your right and the row of trees on your left. Continue straight for a long distance until the path opens up into a wider paved plaza. Keep the large, curved glass building on your right. Ahead, you will spot a group of white statues standing in a circle on a patch of grass. Walk towards these statues and pass them, keeping them on your left. Stop just after passing the statues. The group of white statues is your destination.
